_comment: Canonical FT8 message set for the OpenWSFZ R&R study (STUDY-SPEC §6).

messages.note: Primary study message — all continuous R&R scenarios.
S4 density pool — reply with negative report.
S4 density pool — RR73 special token; S7 third co-channel signal.
S4 density pool — European call, DM grid.
S4 density pool — weak report between two non-primary callsigns.
S4 density pool — Japanese call, PM grid.
S4 density pool — reply to European station.

rr-synth-nonstandard-callsign-packing: Type 4 (i3=4) CQ announcement of a fictional Q-prefix nonstandard/compound callsign. Convention: harness parses this as 'CQ <CALLSIGN>' and packs it via pack_type4_announce, not the standard Type-1 packer. Same callsign used for the committed ihashcall test vector (test_packing.py) so the announced hash and the standard-message hash-reference below are traceably the same station.

rr-linked-cycle-effectiveness-scenario: standard Type 1 message referencing MSG-T4-ANNOUNCE's nonstandard callsign by its 22-bit ihashcall hash (task 1.3's hash sub-range fallback in _pack_callsign) rather than retransmitting it in full. A correctly-resolving decoder should decode this cycle's text as the same literal string; an unresolved decode substitutes the '<...>' placeholder in place of the callsign.
